## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / data adapter
- [ ] Refactor / performance

- [ ] Tests / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -q` passes locally
- [ ] New/changed code has tests
- [ ] **No lookahead / leakage** introduced (features stay causal)
- [ ] **No fabricated metrics** — reports remain honest about baselines
- [ ] No large data or training artifacts committed (only code/config/metadata)
- [ ] No required paid dependency added
- [ ] Risk disclaimers preserved
